items.text:
Arsh,

Yeh khat main tumhe us daur se likh raha hoon jahan zindagi chal rahi hai, magar main nahi. Jahan waqt guzar raha hai, magar andar kuch thehar gaya hai. Haar ka ehsaas itna gehra nahi, jitna thakawat ka hai — kyunki haar insaan ko gira deti hai, lekin thakawat usse uthne ka sabab bhi chheen leti hai.

Aaj kal har simt se haar mehsoos hoti hai. Magar sabse gehri baat yeh hai ke ab khade hone ka mann bhi nahi karta. Jab khud se sawal karta hoon — "Khada kis ke liye hoon?" — to jawab khamoshi ban kar dil mein utar jaata hai.

Haath mein kalam rehti hai aksar,
Magar alfaaz kagaz tak pahunchne se pehle hi thak jaate hain.
Aur jab zabaan chalti hai…
Toh naam un logon ka rehta hai,
Jinka zubaan par aana bhi shayad munasib nahi hota.

Yeh bhi ek ajeeb si haalat hai —
Ke kar bahut kuch sakta hoon,
Magar karna kuch bhi nahi chahta.

Jaise dil ke andar poora samandar ho,
Magar lehrein uthne se inkaar kar rahi ho.

Zindagi bas guzar rahi hai…
Magar har guzarta lamha kuch sikha kar jaata hai.
Kabhi dard ke zariye,
Kabhi sukoon ke lamhon ke zariye.

Kabhi mehsoos hota hai —

"Har roz kuch toot kar samajh aata hai,
Aur har raat kuch ban kar uthta hoon main."

Har din kuch naya realise hota hai.
Kabhi bura lagta hai, kabhi achha bhi lagta hai.
Magar sabse gehri baat yeh hai —
Har ehsaas ek nayi seekh ban kar reh jaata hai.

Ab khane-pine se bhi matlab kam reh gaya hai.
Jaise zaruratein kam ho gayi ho,
Aur soch gehri ho gayi ho.

Magar kahin andar ek roshni ab bhi baqi hai.
Ek umeed —
Ke ek din main khada ho jaunga.

Aur us din…
Dobara nahi baithunga.
Sirf chalunga.

"Gir kar baithna aadat nahi meri,
Bas ek daur hai… jo guzar jayega."

Shayad is liye bhi —
Ke chhoti si zindagi mein main sirf ek baar hara hoon.
Aur woh bhi… jaan kar hara hoon.

Kyuki harana nahi tha.

Us din ke baad…
Jeetne ka mann hi nahi raha.

Jaise dil ne faisla kar liya ho —

"Ek baar haar kar khamosh ho gaya hoon,
Ab jab bolunga, toh jeet kar bolunga."

Ab iss khamoshi mein ghar sa ban gaya hai.
Dard ajnabi nahi raha.
Isterab bhi saathi ban gaya hai.

Yeh chaar diwaarein jo kabhi tanhaai deti thi,
Ab sukoon dene lagi hain.

Chand log hain saath…
Aur jo nahi hain —
Woh dil mein hain.

Aur jo dil mein hote hain…
Woh saamne ho ya door,
Kabhi juda nahi hote.

Kabhi kabhi mehsoos hota hai —

"Kuch chehre yaadon mein bas jaate hain,
Aur phir faasle bhi unhe door nahi kar paate."

Mujhe maloom hai —
Sab chahte hain main wapas khada ho jaun.
Woh ban jaun jo main ban sakta hoon.
Sab achha hi sochte hain…
Aur main unki soch ki qadar karta hoon.

Bas intezaar itna hai —
Ke koi saamne se keh de,
Ke chahte kya hain mujhse.

Tab tak…
Main khamoshi mein hoon.
Seekh raha hoon.
Samajh raha hoon.
Aur shayad… khud ko dobara bana raha hoon.

Kyuki zindagi ne yeh bhi sikha diya hai —

"Rukna bhi safar ka hissa hota hai,
Aur khamoshi bhi awaaz ban jaati hai."

Main ruka hoon…
Magar khatam nahi hua.

Aur jab wapas aaunga —
Toh sirf khada nahi hounga…
Chalunga.

Aur jis din ek baar jeet gaya…
Uske baad har baar jeetunga.

Kyuki yeh wapas aana nahi hoga —
Yeh dobara paida hona hoga.

Aur shayad us din main yeh keh paunga —

"Main gira bhi tha, main thahara bhi tha,
Magar main khatam kabhi nahi hua,
Jo khamoshi mein khud ko dhoond leta hai,
Woh laut kar aksar badal chuka hota hai."

Aur aakhir mein —

"Abhi main khamosh hoon toh yeh samajh lena,
Kii main apni awaaz taiyaar kar raha hoon,
Jo ek baar uth kar chal diya,
Phir woh safar nahi… itihaas likh diya karte hai."

Tumhara hi,
Khamoshi mein ghar banaye hue
Wapas lautne ki tayyari mein
items.title: Khudse Khud ko ek khat: Khamoshi Ke Us Mod Par, Jahan Main Thahar Gaya Hoon
